question: The chart shows regional internet usage statistics (2020-2025). Which of the following statements is best supported by the data shown?

options.A: North America and Africa have nearly the same internet usage percentage.
options.B: Asia Pacific has a higher internet usage percentage than Europe.
options.C: Europe has the highest internet usage percentage among the regions shown.
options.D: Africa has the lowest internet usage percentage among the regions shown.

explanation: This bar chart uses dual encoding: the same value is shown with bar height, bar width, and color intensity. That combination exaggerates differences and can make moderate gaps look much larger. The reliable conclusion is the correct option based on the numeric labels/data.
